input_data.issue_text: Add authentication endpoint for login with email and password. Return access token on success. Include refresh and logout endpoints.
input_data.goal: Add authentication endpoint for login with email and password, return access token on success, include refresh and logout endpoints.
acceptance_criteria: Authentication endpoint accepts login with email and password
Return access token on success from login endpoint
Include refresh endpoint that extends token validity
Include logout endpoint that invalidates the access token

metadata.description: Well-aligned intent: all key concepts from issue captured in goal and criteria

input_data.issue_text: Configure alembic for database schema migration tracking and rollback support.
input_data.goal: Configure alembic for database schema migration tracking.
acceptance_criteria: Alembic configuration file created for database schema
Initial migration generated from current database models
Migration upgrade and downgrade commands work correctly

metadata.description: Partial match: goal captures alembic setup but criteria miss rollback details

input_data.issue_text: Fix the payment processing timeout that occurs when Stripe webhook delivery is delayed by more than 30 seconds. Users see a blank confirmation page.
input_data.goal: Improve application performance and response times across all endpoints.
acceptance_criteria: Response time under 200ms for all GET endpoints
Caching layer added for frequent queries

metadata.description: Mismatch: issue is about Stripe webhook timeout, but intent addresses generic performance optimization
